report.summary: Audited 2 new pages from today's build cycle (DeFi Insurance Protocols Guide, DVT Guide), created 1 OG image, fixed 1 OG image filename mismatch, and resolved 6 UX issues including a missing Link import, missing Home breadcrumb, wrong domain in structured data, and missing semantic HTML.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DeFi Insurance Guide: Added missing `import Link from 'next/link'` — page used <Link> for related articles without importing it, which would cause a runtime error
DeFi Insurance Guide: Wrapped page content in semantic <article> tag for better accessibility and SEO
DVT Guide: Added missing 'Home' breadcrumb link (was only Learn > DVT Guide, now Home > Learn > DVT Guide) and removed dangling href='#' on last breadcrumb item
DVT Guide: Fixed article schema using wrong domain 'cryptodegen.io' — updated to 'degen0x.com' for correct structured data
DVT Guide: Fixed article schema OG image reference from generic 'og-dvt-guide.png' to correct 'og-distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026.svg'
DVT Guide: Wrapped page content in semantic <article> tag for better accessibility and SEO

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — Dark theme with shield/checkmark icon, protocol ranking cards (Nexus Mutual #1 $425M, InsurAce #2, Unslashed #3, Neptune Mutual #4), DeFi/Insurance category badges, brand gradient accent bar
OG image fix: Copied og-distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide.svg to og-distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026.svg to match the filename referenced in layout.tsx metadata

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Today's Build Pages)
items: DeFi Insurance Guide: Good structure — proper TOC with numbered sections, reading time badge, category badges, protocol comparison table, risk grid cards, key takeaways, FAQ section, related articles, disclaimer. Mobile layout OK with maxWidth 900px, flex-wrap on badges

DVT Guide: Good structure — benefits grid cards (Fault Tolerance, Decentralization, Security), step-by-step process, SSV vs Obol comparison, FAQ section, related articles, disclaimer. Responsive grid with minmax(280px, 1fr)
Both pages: Data hierarchy follows scan-first pattern — key stats bolded, category badges visible, section headings clearly sized. No horizontal scroll issues detected on either page
Both pages: No input validation needed — both are static informational learn guides with no user inputs
